setwd("~/personal/15140458/project")

library(biomaRt)

# Read CSV 
df <- read.csv("Mus_musculus_cell_cycle_markers.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Connect to the mouse Ensembl database
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Retrieve mapping from Ensembl ID to gene name
gene_map <- getBM(attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "external_gene_name"),
                  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
                  values = df$geneID,
                  mart = mart)

# Merge with original data
df_annotated <- merge(df, gene_map, 
                      by.x = "geneID", 
                      by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", 
                      all.x = TRUE)

# View result
head(df_annotated)
